description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named On PRs - Linux - Static Analysis that runs on pull requests and workflow dispatches, ignoring changes to markdown files. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job to perform static analysis with PVS-Studio, Conan, and CMake. Install dependencies, configure Conan, run Conan, configure CMake, and perform static analysis. Upload the analysis report as an artifact named static_analysis with a 7-day retention.
